title: Ludhiana Court – Clerk – 56 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Ludhiana Court Clerk Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 56 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ludhiana Court Clerk Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 56 vacancies across Punjab. Candidates with Any Graduate Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 27-05-2026, and closes on 06-06-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through Ludhiana Court website, ludhiana.dcourts.gov.in.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹29,200/- per month (as per letter dated 12.09.2024 of the Govt. of Punjab & Haryana High Court)

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the offline application process as follows:
